name: tasks
$comment: Phase 6 wire shape (0.17.0 / WIRE-07): _action carries {name} only. Per-row toggles use unique action names (toggle-row-${id}) and a stateMutations entry that mimics the checkbox bind's pre-dispatch write into items[i].completed (the server is a pure re-render — the bind path is the source of truth for the new boolean). Per-tab filters (filter-all/filter-active/filter-completed) need no mutation: the handler derives the filter value from the action-name suffix. Per-row delete (delete-row-${id}) needs no mutation: the handler reads the id from the action name and filters the array.
